introSection:
Kerplash is a steel water roller coaster located at Edaville Family Theme Park in Carver, Massachusetts, USA. The ride was built by E&F Miler Industries. It was previously located at Washington State Fair from 1995 until the ride's closure in 2012. Edaville has claimed Kersplash will open for several years, along with bumper boats and a pirate attraction that have never been finished.

In late 2023, the ride was dismantled.
fullText:
Kerplash is a steel water roller coaster located at Edaville Family Theme Park in Carver, Massachusetts, USA. The ride was built by E&F Miler Industries. It was previously located at Washington State Fair from 1995 until the ride's closure in 2012. Edaville has claimed Kersplash will open for several years, along with bumper boats and a pirate attraction that have never been finished.

In late 2023, the ride was dismantled.

Two splashdowns.
